title: 8 Person Construction Contracting Company needs help
excerpt: We’re a specialty construction contractor that needs help building integrations and automations for our work flow we’re already using in Monday. We know what we want Monday to do for us just need external help guiding an…

posts.author: ErikFinishLine (erik Irvine)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re a specialty construction contractor that needs help building integrations and automations for our work flow we’re already using in Monday. We know what we want Monday to do for us just need external help guiding and building it. We use Monday for

Tracking Bids
Converting bids to awarded jobs
converting awarded jobs to planning
Planning the job and sending it off to construction.
Ideally I’d like to transfer all the info we collect to the field crew via a phone app with a filter built specific for them. I’d like accounting to be able to have another filter to track bids and job costs. We have 3 users and 3 unique needs for the info in Monday. Would like help building a library in Monday too. I’d guess 2 weeks of full time work is needed to get us going, may need more help as time goes on. Thanks! -Erik

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ErikFinishLine and welcome to the community. This is certainly something we could assist you with and based on your initial requirements, this could likely all be contained in native monday.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com partner and have helped numerous companies in a variety of industries to build, optimize and enhance their processes and solutions with monday. We are a small team, however each with a Project Management, Programming and Analyst background.

We like to start with a complementary 60 minute discovery session to get a better feel for your overall usage and to ensure we are the best possible partner to deliver the perfect solution for you.

Feel free to DM me here or shoot me a message at info@greenllamas.com. Additionally, check us out online to learn more about what we do!

Thanks Erik, take care.
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.
